nl: How many orders has each customer placed
gold_sql: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY order_count DESC

nl: What is the total revenue per product category
gold_sql: SELECT category, SUM(price) AS total_revenue FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl: Which cities have more than 5 customers
gold_sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY city HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY customer_count DESC

nl: Show the average product price by category
gold_sql: SELECT category, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_price DESC

nl: Find product categories with average price above 50
gold_sql: SELECT category, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category HAVING AVG(price) > 50 ORDER BY avg_price DESC

nl: Count the number of customers in each tier
gold_sql: SELECT tier, COUNT(*) AS count FROM customers GROUP BY tier ORDER BY count DESC

nl: Show maximum stock level for each product category
gold_sql: SELECT category, MAX(stock) AS max_stock FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY max_stock DESC

nl: Which cities have fewer than 3 customers
gold_sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY city HAVING COUNT(*) < 3 ORDER BY customer_count ASC
